sections.heading: This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
sections.text:
This Act may be cited as the Excess Expenditure Short title
Appropriation (2003) Act, 2006.

sections.heading: The expenditure on the services of the Republic during Excess
sections.text:
The expenditure on the services of the Republic during Excess
expenditure
the financial year ended on 31st December, 2003, of the moneys
approved
indicated in respect of the services in the third column of the
Schedule, being expenditure in excess of the moneys appropriated
for services by the Appropriation Act, 2003, and the Supplementary Act No. 8 of
2003
Appropriation (2003) Act, 2005, is hereby approved.
Act No. 8 of
2005
Single Copies of this Act can be obtained from the Government Printer
P.O. Box 30136, Lusaka, Price K500 each
